entryCriteria.formula: (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Advisor") || CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Social Media Agent Junior")) && OR (((CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByAgent__c + CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByDealer__c ) > 5 && ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Regular") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Premium") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Competitive vehicle") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Wagoneer")) , ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Other (special circumstances)"))

(CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Specialist New") || CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Specialist Junior") || CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Specialist Senior") || CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Level3 Agent") || CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Top Care Agent") || CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Social Media Agent Senior")) && OR (((CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByAgent__c + CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByDealer__c ) > 10 && ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Regular") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Premium") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Competitive vehicle") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Wagoneer")) , ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Other (special circumstances)"))

CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Area Manager") && OR (((CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByAgent__c + CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByDealer__c ) > 20 && ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Regular") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Premium") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Competitive vehicle") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Wagoneer")) , ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Other (special circumstances)"))

CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Supervisor") && OR (((CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByAgent__c + CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByDealer__c ) > 20 && ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Regular") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Premium") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Competitive vehicle") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Wagoneer")) , ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Other (special circumstances)"))

CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name,"Special Investigation") && OR (((CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByAgent__c + CC_TotalRentalDaysProvidedByDealer__c ) > 10 && ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Regular") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Premium") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Competitive vehicle") || ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Wagoneer")) , ISPICKVAL(CC_DailyRate__c ,"Other (special circumstances)"))

ApprovalProcess.description: NAFTA-3 CC-543. Approval process for Rental Car Request for Premium Customers of USA region.
ApprovalProcess.label: Rental Approval For Premium Customers
